exemplar.title: What is the relationship between personal experience and knowledge?

detailedExemplarData.title: What is the relationship between personal experience and knowledge?

strengths: Clear identification of three specific real-world objects with rich personal contexts
Consistent, explicit links drawn to the IA prompt across all objects
Substantial and coherent justifications supported by relevant evidence and citations
weaknesses: Analysis sometimes relies on descriptive narrative rather than deeper theoretical insight
Repetitive phrasing and occasional lapses in academic tone reduce precision
Some source details and TOK terminology are missing or inconsistently applied
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs exhibition meets the descriptors for the 7â8 band: three well-defined objects are situ- ated in clear real-world contexts, and each is tied explicitly to the prompt âWhat is the relationship between personal experience and knowledge?â. Justifications are generally well-supported by evidence (e.g., publisher citations, discussion of training regimes and symbolism) and coherently framed through the chosen prompt. Structure and navigation are strengths, and the commentary shows critical reflection on bias, experiential learning, and intergenerational knowledge transmission. However, the analysis occasionally lapses into description rather than in-depth theoretical engagement (missing explicit knowledge questions and TOK terminology), and some academic conventions (full citations, consistent bibliographic style) need tightening. These factors prevent the work from reaching the sustained precision and depth required for the 9â10 band, justifying a final score of 8.

annotations.comment: Clearly defining each object with a header aids navigationâmaintain this structure consistently.
The student clearly names the object and situates it within their personal context, demonstrating a concrete real-world link.
Phrasing such as âaltered my perspectiveâ recurs multiple times, creating redundancy. Vary the language to maintain reader engagement.
Make an explicit reference to the IA prompt within your commentary (e.g. âThis object illustrates how personal experience shapes knowledge byâ¦â).
Integrate TOK terminologyâsuch as âways of knowingâ or âknowledge questionsââto deepen the theoretical analysis of your bodily experience.
The image lacks a caption indicating date, location of use, and significance of wearâadd these details to strengthen context.
The discussion of firstâperson versus secondâperson perspective shows analytical insight into how personal experience differs from observation.
No in-text citation accompanies the cartoon imageâadd source details (publication date, issue, page) to validate its origin.
The connection between viewing the cartoon and your political knowledge remains abstract; include a concrete example of an opinion you formed.
Consider explaining how irony operates as a way of knowingâhow does it shape understanding or mislead audiences?
Introduce a knowledge question here (e.g., âTo what extent do biased sources shape our understanding?â) to anchor analysis.
Acknowledging the need for diverse perspectives to counteract bias shows critical reflection on knowledge acquisition.
The angel necklace image lacks contextâinclude acquisition date, cultural background, and symbolism details.
The object header is concise and clearâthis labeling helps the reader follow the structure.
The narrative in this section ends abruptly. Ensure each objectâs discussion forms a complete, coherent argument.
Explicitly tie this object back to the prompt (âWhat is the relationshipâ¦â), emphasizing how it shapes your religious knowledge.
The intergenerational example effectively demonstrates how familial practice shapes knowledge formation.
Introduce TOK concepts like personal versus shared knowledge here to deepen your theoretical framework.
The resource list entries are not referenced inline. Link each citation to its in-text mention for clarity.
Apply a consistent bibliographic style (APA, MLA) across all references to enhance academic rigor.
Provide full details (author, URL, publication) for the political cartoon source to allow verification.
Add a concluding paragraph tying together insights from all three objects to reinforce the exhibitionâs coherence.
Consider adding a counterclaim in Object 1: how might someone without firstâhand pain still acquire dance knowledge?
Discuss how emotion as a way of knowing influences your interpretation of the political cartoonâs message.
Cite specific biblical passages or doctrine when discussing silverâs purity symbolism to substantiate the claim.
Add a caption to your ballet shoes photo indicating wear patterns to illustrate experiential learning visually.
Annotate elements of the political cartoon (labels, expressions) to show how irony and bias are communicated visually.
Explain the angelâs symbolism in relation to your familial faith to reinforce the connection between object and knowledge.
Discuss how cultural narratives reinforce religious knowledge transmission across generations.
The informal phrase âglamourise and worshipâ reduces academic toneâopt for more precise terminology.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
